description:
Audio Library is one of the most trusted platforms dedicated to providing Background and No Copyright Music for content creators.

✨ *FREE DOWNLOAD HERE:*  https://audiolibrary.com.co/filo-starquez/need-you


✅ *HOW DO I MONETIZE MY VIDEO WITH THIS TRACK?* 

You can use this song for *FREE* in any YouTube video and monetize it—just make sure to include the following in your description *(copy and paste into your description)* 👇

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
Music: Need You by Filo Starquez https://soundcloud.com/filo-starquez
License: Creative Commons — Attribution-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported — CC BY-ND 3.0
Free Download / Stream: https://audiolibrary.com.co/filo-starquez/need-you
Music promoted by Audio Library: https://youtu.be/Z2Ye68jSsHA
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––


🎶 *ABOUT THE SONG* 

Discover the captivating rhythm of "Need You" by Filo Starquez, an upbeat yet incredibly soothing *Hip Hop & Rap* gem designed to enhance your visual storytelling. With its steady beats and engaging *lo-fi mood* , this track serves as the ultimate *background music* for *study sessions* , tech *tutorials* , or casual *gaming streams* . Let the warm melodies and rhythmic bassline transform your videos into an immersive experience that keeps your audience fully engaged from start to finish.


🎶 *KEY MUSICAL SEGMENTS FROM THE SONG* 

0:00 - Intro: Soft melodies and gentle beat buildup begin.
0:17 - Main Groove: Full beat drops with catchy vocal samples.
0:36 - Verse 1: Stripped-back rhythm with a deep, steady bass.
1:31 - Hook: Catchy vocal samples return with full energy.
2:00 - Verse 2: Dynamic variations in beat and synth layers.


🎧 *LISTEN ON YOUR FAVORITE PLATFORMS* 

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0vjDF4diBrmEbJx6tz2DBJ
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/co/song/need-you/1860024741
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=Fdr41jUMpM0


👋 *GET IN TOUCH WITH FILO STARQUEZ* 

filostarquez@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/filo_starquez
https://filostarquez.wixsite.com/music


⚠️ *HOW TO USE THIS MUSIC FOR FREE (GUIDELINES)* 

-  You must include full credits in your video description.
-  You cannot claim the music as your own.
-  You cannot sell, license, or distribute the music in any form.
-  You cannot remove or alter any part of the credits.
-  You cannot use this music as background for your own musical compositions without the artist’s explicit consent.
-  If you wish to use this music in projects outside of YouTube, you must obtain permission from the artist.
-  Failure to comply with these guidelines may result in a copyright claim or strike.
-  If you have any questions or need further clarification, please contact the artist directly.
